calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Shari Marks, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Leaf Funding, Inc., a Delaware corporation.
No appearance by defendants Edmond A. Zingaro, M.D., Inc., a California corporation, also known as Edmond A. Zingaro, M.D., or Edmond Zingaro, an individual, also known as Edmond A. Zingaro, M.D.
Default was entered as against defendant Edmond A. Zingaro, an individual, alos known as Edmond Zingaro, M.D., on August 2, 2010.
Default was entered against defendant Edmond A. Zingaro, M.D., Inc., a California corporation, also known as Edmond A. Zingaro, M.D., on September 23, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 31, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on September 9, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Leaf Funding, Inc., a Delaware corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Edmond A. Zingaro, M.D., Inc., a California corporation, also known as Edmond A. Zingaro, M.D., and Edmond Zingaro, an individual, also known as Edmond A. Zingara, M.D., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $89,614.57.
Prejudgment Interest - $14,264.68.
Attorney's Fees - $3,461.00.
Costs - $475.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $107,815.25.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
